evidence_boundary.description: Read-only exact-contract OPRA/NBBO daily close-check replay. It uses trusted historical spread exit snapshots through the historical options store and does not mutate tracked positions.
evidence_boundary.not_claimed: This is not yet a minute-by-minute intraday stop simulation.

decision_summary.recommended_next_action: Keep live stops unchanged for now. Treat the best non-destructive daily close-check stop as a research candidate, then test minute-by-minute OPRA/NBBO stops and entry avoidance filters before promotion.
entry_filter_hypotheses: repeat ticker cooldown for TSLA/MSTR/QQQ-style clusters

evidence_boundary.description: One-year trusted intraday OPRA/NBBO exact replay rows from the regular multi-lane artifact. These are replay-backed historical paper rows, not live broker fills or Postgres-tracked rows.
evidence_boundary.not_claimed: This does not mutate tracked positions and does not make replay rows live-production fills.

decision_summary.recommended_next_action: Keep live stops unchanged and prioritize entry avoidance filters before any tighter stop.
entry_filter_hypotheses: repeat ticker cooldown for TSLA/MSTR/QQQ-style clusters
